name: malchela-marketplace
description: MalChela — A YARA & Malware Analysis Toolkit with Claude MCP integration for DFIR analysts.

plugins.name: malchela
plugins.description: Exposes MalChela's full malware analysis suite to Claude: file analysis (hashes, entropy, PE metadata, YARA, VirusTotal), string extraction with MITRE ATT&CK mapping, hash lookups against VirusTotal and MalwareBazaar, NSRL known-good queries, and directory scanning for file type anomalies.
